original_image_tags: A rectangular stamp in the bottom left corner. The top half is blue with white text "DECLASSIFIED". The bottom half is white with black text "Authority: NND 90986".
A rectangular stamp in the bottom right corner. Text reads "SEARCHED / INDEXED / SERIALIZED / FILED / MAY 2 4 1950 / FBI - NEW ORLEANS". There is a handwritten initial or mark in the "INDEXED" line.

elements.description: A single page document consisting entirely of typed text. It includes headers, a code table, several paragraphs of narrative, a distribution list, and a bottom footer. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts present on the page.

judge.reason: Description A details two stamps with specific quoted text (e.g., 'DECLASSED', 'Authority: NND 90986'), while Description B states there are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts present on the page, contradicting the visual content described in A.
